title: hieracium tephrosoma subsp. kuekenthalianum
intro: Hieracium tephrosoma subsp. kuekenthalianum, also known as Kuekenthal's hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium tephrosoma plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium tephrosoma subsp. kuekenthalianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
